UI_JBLogging_Menu_Req_Clear_Stumps: Hammer, Sledgehammer, Club Hammer, Pickaxe or Stone Maul and Tree Stump
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Req_Clear_Boulders: Hammer, Sledgehammer, Club Hammer, Pickaxe or Stone Maul and Boulder
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Gather_Logs: Automatically identifies and picks up wood logs in the selected area and moves them to your designated storage.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Gather_Planks: Searches the area for loose planks to gather and store.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Gather_Firewoo: Collects all cut firewood from the ground and brings it to your firewood inventory or storage.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Gather_Stones: Scours the ground for loose stones and rocks, harvesting them into your bags.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Gather_Branche: Gathers twigs and branches from the ground, perfect for starting fires or crafting.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Clear_Trees: Queues up the chopping of all trees in the selected area. Requires an axe.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Clear_Stumps: Uses a tool to remove unsightly tree stumps. Requires a tool with the Remove Stump tag.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Clear_Bushes: Clears out bushes and tall shrubbery using a cutting tool.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Clear_Grass: Cuts down grass and weeds to clear the terrain.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Clear_Boulders: Breaks apart large boulders into usable stones. Requires a pickaxe or sledgehammer.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Saw_Planks: Automatically processes gathered logs into planks using a saw.
UI_JBLogging_Menu_Tooltip_Chop_Firewood: Splits logs into firewood for your wood-burning stoves and fireplaces.
UI_JBLogging_Tree_Too_Far: That's too far, I can't see
UI_JBLogging_ModOptions_KeepMenuOnTop: Show Logging Mouse Menu At The Top
